The '''''Tavya''-class armored picket''' was a heavy [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] constructed by [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.]] and used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
In contrast to the large [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] created by HKD for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], the ''Tavya''-class (named after the [[Tavya system/Legends|Tavya system]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]) was a small, fast scout, standing in a tradition that stretched back to the [[Delaya-class courier|''Delaya''-class courier]] of four thousand years earlier, and also embodied by the contemporary [[Seltaya-class fast courier|''Seltaya''-class fast courier]].

The ''Tavya''-class carried a single pilot, and was well-armed with energy and missile weapons, including a turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. An additional [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher could be slung below the ventral fuselage for extra firepower. Unlike many of the fighters in use during the Clone Wars, it was equipped with a fully-functional internal [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].

==History==
As the Clone Wars intensified, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' fleet began a series of successful surprise attacks against Republic convoys at key hyperspace exit points using intelligence secretly supplied by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as Darth Sidious. To prevent these attacks, Hoersch-Kessel Drive developed the ''Tavya''-class to scout locations and scan for potential threats to important diplomatic vessels or military convoys.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}}
